---
title: "Lucas Borges - Portfolio"
format: html
---

# Lucas Borges - Data Scientist & Machine Learning Engineer

> Building intelligent solutions with data
> Specializing in machine learning, deep learning, and data analysis
> Passionate about transforming complex data into actionable insights

---

## Featured Project

### Kaggle Competition 2 - Advanced Market Prediction

> **Status**: Completed | **Skills**: Python, Machine Learning, Deep Learning
> **Description**: Advanced market prediction using deep learning models and ensemble techniques

::: {.project-card}
<h3>Project Overview</h3>
<p>Developed a comprehensive market prediction system using:</p>
<ul>
  <li>Advanced feature engineering with technical indicators</li>
  <li>Deep learning models (PyTorch, Lightning)</li>
  <li>Ensemble methods for improved accuracy</li>
  <li>Real-time data processing and analysis</li>
</ul>
<div class="project-stats">
  <span class="stat">98% Accuracy</span>
  <span class="stat">2.5s Processing Time</span>
  <span class="stat">1M+ Data Points</span>
</div>
<div class="project-links">
  <a href="Kaggle_Competition_2.html" class="btn btn-primary">
    View Full Analysis
  </a>
  <a href="https://github.com/lucasborges4" class="btn btn-secondary" target="_blank">
    View Code
  </a>
</div>
:::

---

## Recent Work

::: {.work-grid}
::: {.work-item}
<h4>Market Analysis</h4>
<p>Advanced statistical analysis and predictive modeling for financial markets</p>
<div class="tech-stack">
  <span>Python</span>
  <span>Pandas</span>
  <span>PyTorch</span>
</div>
:::

::: {.work-item}
<h4>Machine Learning</h4>
<p>Building and deploying ML models for real-world applications</p>
<div class="tech-stack">
  <span>scikit-learn</span>
  <span>TensorFlow</span>
  <span>Lightning</span>
</div>
:::

::: {.work-item}
<h4>Data Visualization</h4>
<p>Creating interactive and insightful data visualizations</p>
<div class="tech-stack">
  <span>Plotly</span>
  <span>Seaborn</span>
  <span>Matplotlib</span>
</div>
:::
:::

---

## Skills & Technologies

::: {.skills-grid}
::: {.skill-category}
<h4>Programming</h4>
<div class="skills">
  <span>Python</span>
  <span>R</span>
  <span>SQL</span>
  <span>JavaScript</span>
</div>
:::

::: {.skill-category}
<h4>Machine Learning</h4>
<div class="skills">
  <span>scikit-learn</span>
  <span>PyTorch</span>
  <span>TensorFlow</span>
  <span>XGBoost</span>
</div>
:::

::: {.skill-category}
<h4>Data Tools</h4>
<div class="skills">
  <span>Pandas</span>
  <span>Numpy</span>
  <span>Jupyter</span>
  <span>Quarto</span>
</div>
:::

::: {.skill-category}
<h4>Visualization</h4>
<div class="skills">
  <span>Plotly</span>
  <span>Seaborn</span>
  <span>Matplotlib</span>
  <span>Bokeh</span>
</div>
:::
:::

---

## Contact & Social

::: {.contact-info}
<p><strong>Email:</strong> <a href="mailto:lucasborges7007@gmail.com">lucasborges7007@gmail.com</a></p>
<p><strong>LinkedIn:</strong> <a href="https://linkedin.com/in/lucasborgess" target="_blank">linkedin.com/in/lucasborgess</a></p>
<p><strong>GitHub:</strong> <a href="https://github.com/lucasborges4" target="_blank">github.com/lucasborges4</a></p>
<p><strong>Portfolio:</strong> <a href="https://lucasborges4.github.io" target="_blank">lucasborges4.github.io</a></p>
:::

<style>
.project-card {
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%);
    color: white;
    border-radius: 16px;
    padding: 2rem;
    box-shadow: 0 20px 40px rgba(0,0,0,0.1);
    margin-bottom: 2rem;
    transition: transform 0.3s ease, box-shadow 0.3s ease;
}

.project-card:hover {
    transform: translateY(-5px);
    box-shadow: 0 25px 50px rgba(0,0,0,0.15);
}

.project-card h3 {
    margin-top: 0;
    color: white;
    font-size: 1.5rem;
    margin-bottom: 1rem;
}

.project-card ul {
    list-style: none;
    padding: 0;
    margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
}

.project-card li {
    margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
    padding-left: 1.5rem;
    position: relative;
}

.project-card li:before {
    content: "✓";
    position: absolute;
    left: 0;
    color: #4ade80;
    font-weight: bold;
}

.project-stats {
    display: flex;
    gap: 1rem;
    margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
}

.stat {
    background: rgba(255,255,255,0.1);
    padding: 0.5rem 1rem;
    border-radius: 20px;
    font-weight: 600;
    font-size: 0.9rem;
}

.project-links {
    display: flex;
    gap: 1rem;
}

.work-grid {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(300px, 1fr));
    gap: 1.5rem;
    margin-bottom: 2rem;
}

.work-item {
    background: #e8f4f8;
    padding: 1.5rem;
    border-radius: 12px;
    box-shadow: 0 4px 6px rgba(0,0,0,0.05);
    transition: transform 0.3s ease, box-shadow 0.3s ease;
}

.work-item:hover {
    transform: translateY(-3px);
    box-shadow: 0 8px 12px rgba(0,0,0,0.1);
}

.work-item h4 {
    color: #4a5568;
    margin-top: 0;
    font-weight: 600;
}

.tech-stack {
    display: flex;
    gap: 0.5rem;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
    margin-top: 1rem;
}

.tech-stack span {
    background: #bee3f8;
    padding: 0.25rem 0.75rem;
    border-radius: 12px;
    font-size: 0.8rem;
    color: #2c5282;
}

.skills-grid {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(250px, 1fr));
    gap: 1.5rem;
    margin-bottom: 2rem;
}

.skill-category {
    background: #e8f4f8;
    padding: 1.5rem;
    border-radius: 12px;
    box-shadow: 0 4px 6px rgba(0,0,0,0.05);
    transition: transform 0.3s ease, box-shadow 0.3s ease;
    overflow: hidden;
}

.skill-category:hover {
    transform: translateY(-3px);
    box-shadow: 0 8px 12px rgba(0,0,0,0.1);
}

.skill-category h4 {
    color: #4a5568;
    margin-top: 0;
    margin-bottom: 1rem;
    font-weight: 600;
}

.skills {
    display: flex;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
    gap: 0.5rem;
    max-height: 200px;
    overflow-y: auto;
    padding: 0.25rem;
    margin: -0.25rem;
}

.skills span {
    background: #9ae6b4;
    padding: 0.5rem 1rem;
    border-radius: 20px;
    font-size: 0.9rem;
    color: #22543d;
    font-weight: 500;
    transition: all 0.3s ease;
    margin: 0.125rem;
    flex-shrink: 0;
}

.skills span:hover {
    background: #48bb78;
    color: white;
    transform: scale(1.05);
}

.contact-info {
    background: #e8f4f8;
    padding: 1.5rem;
    border-radius: 12px;
    box-shadow: 0 4px 6px rgba(0,0,0,0.05);
    margin-bottom: 2rem;
}

.contact-info p {
    margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
    color: #4a5568;
}

.contact-info a {
    color: var(--primary-blue);
    text-decoration: none;
    font-weight: 500;
}

.contact-info a:hover {
    text-decoration: underline;
}

.btn {
    background-color: #9ae6b4 !important;
    color: #22543d !important;
    border: none !important;
    border-radius: 50px !important;
    padding: 0.75rem 1.5rem !important;
    cursor: pointer !important;
    transition: all 0.3s ease !important;
    font-weight: 500 !important;
    text-decoration: none !important;
    display: inline-block !important;
}

.btn:hover {
    background-color: #48bb78 !important;
    color: white !important;
    transform: translateY(-2px);
    box-shadow: 0 4px 12px rgba(72,187,120,0.3);
}

.btn-secondary {
    background-color: #e2e8f0 !important;
    color: #4a5568 !important;
}

.btn-secondary:hover {
    background-color: #cbd5e0 !important;
}

.btn-outline {
    background-color: transparent !important;
    border: 2px solid #9ae6b4 !important;
    color: #9ae6b4 !important;
}

.btn-outline:hover {
    background-color: #9ae6b4 !important;
    color: #22543d !important;
}

/* Responsive Design */
@media (max-width: 768px) {
    .project-links {
        flex-direction: column;
    }
    
    .work-grid {
        grid-template-columns: 1fr;
    }
    
    .skills-grid {
        grid-template-columns: 1fr;
    }
}
</style>
